title: openFDA Search Response
description: Common envelope returned by every openFDA dataset endpoint (drug, device, food, animal & veterinary, tobacco, other). The shape of `results[*]` varies by dataset; `meta` is identical across all endpoints.

meta.description: Disclaimer, license, last-updated date, and pagination metadata.

disclaimer.description: Notice that openFDA data is not for clinical use.

terms.description: URL of the openFDA terms of service.

license.description: URL of the CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication.

last_updated.description: Date the underlying dataset was last refreshed.

results.description: Pagination metadata for the returned page.

skip.description: Offset used for this page (capped at 25,000).

limit.description: Page size for this request (capped at 1,000).

total.description: Total number of records matching the search expression.

results.description: Per-dataset records. Shape varies by endpoint; consult the per-endpoint reference. Absent when `count` aggregation is requested.
